calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-30-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Bruce M. Lubarsky, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for small claims appeal. Appellant Arden Van Upp appears in Pro Per; Respondent Ryan M. Keane appears in Pro Per. Parties and witnesses were previously sworn.
9:15am
Mr. Keane presents his case in the narrative
9:22am
Ms. Van Upp presents her case in the narrative
EXH1 Move out closing statement (returned to Ms. Van Upp in open court)
EXH2 Original Lease dated 5/27/05 (returned to Ms. Van Upp in open court)
9:35am
Mr. Keane responds
9:40am
Ms. Van Upp responds
9:42am
Mr. Mr. Keane requests that records be amended to show Ms. Van Upp also uses her maiden name - Dee Rich. Judge Lubarsky rules that per ccp473, the name change can be accepted.
9:45am
Matter is submitted
